zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Giles Chapman於1630年8月出生在英國多瑟特斯瓦納時，他的父親Richard Chapman32歲，母親Agnes Whiscarde28歲。他於1689年10月6日與Katherine Gillingham在英國多瑟特文特爾布恩 斯普萊頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1696年6月在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特斯瓦納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Giles Chapman于1630年8月出生在英国多瑟特斯瓦納时，他的父亲Richard Chapman32岁，母亲Agnes Whiscarde28岁。他于1689年10月6日与Katherine Gillingham在英国多瑟特文特爾布恩 斯普萊頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1696年6月在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特斯瓦納。

nameMeanings.name: Chapman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a merchant or trader, Middle English chap(pe)man, chepman, Old English cēapmann, cēpemann, a compound of cēap ‘barter, bargain, price, property’ + mann ‘man’.
Jewish: adopted probably for a like-sounding or like-meaning name in some other European language; see for example   Kaufman  .

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. John Chapmen (sic) was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

variants.name: Kaufman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Chaim, Emanuel, Moshe, Eytan, Herschel, Zvi, Ari, Aron.
Americanized form of German   Kaufmann  , and a variant of the same Jewish surname.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Kaufman meaning ‘merchant’. Compare Koyfman 2.

variants.name: Chipman
meanings: English: from Middle English chipman (Old English cȳp(e)mann), a side form of chapman, chepman ‘merchant, trader’; see Chapman , with which this name was interchangeable.

variants.name: Copeman
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): patronymic from the early Middle English personal name Cop(e)man, an Anglicized form of Old Scandinavian Kaupmaðr. It is a transferred use of Old Scandinavian kaupmaðr (Old Danish køpman) ‘merchant’, cognate with Old English cēapmann (see Chapman ), but there is no evidence for the occupational term in Middle English.
Americanized form of North German   Koopmann   or Dutch   Koopman  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Giles Chapman was born in August 1630, in Swanage, Dorset, England, his father, Richard Chapman, was 32 and his mother, Agnes Whiscarde, was 28. He married Katherine Gillingham on 6 October 1689, in Winterbourne Steepleton, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in June 1696, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Swanage, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Giles Chapman est né en août 1630, à Swanage, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Richard Chapman, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes Whiscarde, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Gillingham le 6 octobre 1689, à Winterbourne Steepleton, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en juin 1696, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Swanage, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Giles Chapman im August 1630 in Swanage, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Chapman 32 und seine Mutter Agnes Whiscarde 28. Er hat am 6. Oktober 1689 in Winterbourne Steepleton, Dorset, England Katherine Gillingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Juni 1696 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Swanage, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Giles Chapman è nato il nel agosto 1630 nel Swanage, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Richard Chapman, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Whiscarde, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Gillingham il 6 ottobre 1689, nel Winterbourne Steepleton, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1696, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Swanage, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Giles Chapmanが1630年8月にイギリスドールセトスワナッジで生まれた時，父Richard Chapmanは32歳，母Agnes Whiscardeは28歳であった。1689年10月6日にイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン スティープレトンでKatherine Gillinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1696年6月に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトスワナッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Giles Chapman(이)가 1630년 8월 영국 도르세트 스와나지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Chapman(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Whiscarde(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1689년 10월 6일 영국 도르세트 윈터보우른 스티플레턴에서 Katherine Gillingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1696년 6월 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 스와나지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Giles Chapman nasceu em agosto de 1630, em Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Chapman, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Whiscarde, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Gillingham em 6 de outubro de 1689, em Winterbourne Steepleton, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em junho de 1696, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Giles Chapman родился август 1630 г. в местности сванадж, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Chapman было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Whiscarde, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Gillingham 6 октября 1689 г. в местности винтирбурн стиплетон, дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер июнь 1696 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности сванадж, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Giles Chapman nació en agosto de 1630, en Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Chapman, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Agnes Whiscarde, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Katherine Gillingham el 6 de octubre de 1689, en Winterbourne Steepleton, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en junio de 1696, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra.
